response.global_analysis:

2. JSON Usage: Performed 100% manual transcription for the spoken dialogue segment at the end of the video (from 04:43 onwards). No subtitles were generated for the initial instrumental/slideshow part as there were no vocals or essential narrative-driving visual texts to subtitle.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset of each speaker with instantaneous transitions to prevent any lag.
